pi_items.source: Mathematical verification: 24 hours * 60 minutes * 60 seconds = 86400 seconds. Confirmed in task description.

pi_items.verified_value: Provided by Natural Earth (variant attribution acceptable; official primary attribution is 'Made with Natural Earth')
pi_items.source: Web search of Natural Earth Terms of Use (naturalearthdata.com) shows official attribution is 'Made with Natural Earth'. However, 'Provided by Natural Earth' is a documented variant used in attribution contexts. GeoServer supports custom attribution text.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh line 42: PNG file created at /usr/local/tomcat/webapps/geoserver/ne_logo.png. Tomcat webapps root is served at http://localhost:8080/geoserver/.
Standard MIME type for PNG files confirmed by MDN, IANA media types registry, and web standards. PNG file extension (.png) produces image/png MIME type.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh line 42: 'convert -size 88x31' creates logo with 88 pixel width. 88x31 is a historic, standard web button size per IndieWeb documentation and web history.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh line 42: 'convert -size 88x31' creates logo with 31 pixel height. 88x31 is the classic web button standard size (1990s-era convention that remains in use).

privileged_info_summary: Task requires configuring GeoServer layer 'ne:ne_countries' with HTTP cache headers of 86400 seconds (24 hours) and WMS Attribution settings including title 'Provided by Natural Earth', logo URL 'http://localhost:8080/geoserver/ne_logo.png' with MIME type 'image/png' and dimensions 88x31 pixels. Data comes from Natural Earth (real, public geospatial data). All metadata claims are verified: cache-age correctly equals 24 hours; attribution title is acceptable variant of official Natural Earth attribution; logo URL, type, and dimensions are confirmed by setup scripts and standard specifications.
